ad_placements.frequency_cap: no more than 3 times per session
ad_placements.reasoning: Players are motivated to continue after a tough loss, especially on hard or narrative-critical levels. Extra intuition is a natural, desirable reward. Thematic: Morchella 'tunes in' to the city's whispers for one more insight.

ad_placements.frequency_cap: no more than 4 times per session
ad_placements.reasoning: Encourages skillful play and rhythm mastery. Feels like a celebratory encore, not a grind. Tied to the core loop and meta progression, so players WANT to engage for faster upgrades/unlocks.

ad_placements.reward: Random rare booster (e.g., Synesthesia Blossom) for the challenge run
ad_placements.reasoning: Daily event = routine engagement. Reward is appealing but optional, fits the jazz improvisation theme (randomness), and doesn't block progress.

ad_placements.frequency_cap: no more than 1 per 3 minutes, only at case/pack boundaries
ad_placements.reasoning: Interstitials only after major narrative beats. No disruption of gameplay or immersion, minimal retention impact.

ad_placements.frequency_cap: persistent, but only in non-gameplay menus
ad_placements.reasoning: Non-intrusive, only shown when player is customizing or managing meta. Never interrupts puzzle or story.

iap_offers.name: Jazz Noir Starter Pack
iap_offers.content: 500 clue_energy, 5 dream_fragments, 2 Synesthesia Blossom boosters, unique office décor (Neon Spore Lamp)

iap_offers.name: Detective's Dream Bundle
iap_offers.content: 1500 clue_energy, 20 dream_fragments, 5 Veil Ripper boosters, exclusive jazz soundtrack track, rare avatar frame

iap_offers.name: Remove Ads: Noir Mode
iap_offers.content: Removes interstitials and banners, +1 daily rewarded video for dream_fragments, exclusive 'Noir Detective' office skin
iap_offers.trigger: shown after 3rd session or after 5th interstitial

iap_offers.name: Festival Pass: Neon Jazz Festival
iap_offers.content: Unlocks premium reward track in limited-time collection event: extra boosters, rare décor, exclusive suspect profile
iap_offers.trigger: on first entry to festival event

iap_offers.name: Dream Fragment Pack
iap_offers.trigger: any time from store, or offer if player is <2 dream_fragments from an upgrade

hard_currency.name: Dream Fragments
sinks: Unlocking narrative branches or suspect profiles

energy_lives.monetization: Extra lives sold in packs: 3 for $0.99, or via rewarded video (watch to refill 1 life, max 2 times/day)

events.name: Neon Jazz Festival
events.monetization_role: Drives Festival Pass sales, increases engagement via exclusive décor/boosters, and timed collection rewards.

events.name: Dream Fragment Hunt
events.monetization_role: Leaderboard prizes include rare boosters and dream_fragments, encouraging IAP for event progress and extra attempts.

events.name: Noir Night Limited Offer
events.monetization_role: Time-limited bundles with exclusive décor, boosters, and currency. Creates FOMO and ARPPU spikes.
